description: External capability registry. Runtime matching must use schema descriptions and aliases from this file, not hardcoded keyword tables in Python.

capabilities.name: 轻量对话能力
capabilities.description: Low-resource quick dialogue and basic Q&A for constrained hardware.

capabilities.name: 标准对话能力
capabilities.description: Standard dialogue, writing, summarization, and general Q&A in Chinese.

capabilities.name: 代码能力
capabilities.description: Code generation, review, error analysis, project repair, and development assistance.

capabilities.name: 推理分析能力
capabilities.description: Complex problem decomposition, analysis, reasoning, and strategy formulation.

capabilities.name: 项目知识能力
capabilities.description: Query local repositories, GitHub stars, reference summaries, and Repo Memory for project knowledge.

capabilities.name: 技能仓能力
capabilities.description: List and manage local skill store capabilities.

capabilities.name: 工作流能力
capabilities.description: List and manage local workflows and automation.

capabilities.name: 沙箱命令能力
capabilities.description: Execute approved commands in a sandboxed environment after approval.

capabilities.name: 网页抓取能力
capabilities.description: Fetch public web pages, create local snapshots for subsequent search and content reading.

capabilities.name: 联网搜索能力
capabilities.description: Search the public web for external or fresh information when local memory is insufficient.

capabilities.name: 天气查询能力
capabilities.description: Query real-time weather via geocoding and Open-Meteo when a location is resolved.

capabilities.name: 本地时间日期能力
capabilities.description: Read current local date, time, timezone, clock information, and host machine current time.

capabilities.name: 相对日期计算能力
capabilities.description: Calculate relative date or date offset after planner resolves the offset argument.

capabilities.name: 视频生成目录能力
capabilities.description: Query video generation model catalog and ComfyUI/remote video generation pipeline.
